title: IntegrationManifest
description: Aggregated manifest emitted by the DevOps Integration Agent after merging multiple Worker session outputs. Records the aggregate governance posture, worker run references, and integration decision. Part of Phase 5e — Scalable Policy-Bound Autonomy.

integration_id.description: Unique identifier for this integration batch.

timestamp.description: When the integration manifest was created.

release_id.description: Release train identifier (e.g., 'train-20260224'). Present when integration_strategy is 'staged' or 'release_train'.

worker_runs.description: References to individual worker run manifests.

pr_number.description: PR number created by the worker.

manifest_path.description: Path to the worker's individual run manifest (governance/manifests/run-<task-id>.json).

status.description: Integration status of this worker's output.

confidence_score.description: Confidence score from the worker's governance review.

collision_domain.description: Collision domain the worker operated in.

aggregate_confidence.description: Aggregate confidence score across all integrated workers. Calculated as the minimum of all individual worker confidence scores (weakest-link model).

risk_level.description: Aggregate risk level for the integration batch.

policy_profile.description: Policy profile applied to the integration decision.

human_intervention.description: Whether human intervention was required during integration.

integration_decision.description: Final integration decision. 'merge_to_main' = all workers integrated successfully. 'hold_for_review' = human review required. 'reject' = integration failed. 'partial_merge' = some workers integrated, others failed.

parallel_efficiency.description: Ratio of completed_sessions / max_concurrent_sessions. Tracks parallelization effectiveness.

duration_ms.description: Total duration of the integration batch in milliseconds.
